title: Oxidized Copper Crafting
description: Makes copper stuff such as copper doors and copper trapdoors craftable.
body:
# Oxidized Copper Crafting
This datapack makes exposed, weathered, and oxidized copper doors and trapdoors craftable by making the recipe require a single block of copper to use as a base. 
> 
> The main recipe for crafting unoxidized copper doors and trapdoors have also been changed to require a single copper block as a base. 
> 
> The datapack also allows waxed copper doors and trapdoors to be crafted using a waxed copper block as the base.
> 
> All recipes can have the base block be placed in the left or right slot of the center for doors, and the top or bottom slots of the center for trapdoors.
>
> The door and trapdoor recipes have been changed to output more doors and trapdoors in order to compensate for the extra copper that is required for the recipe.

Here is an example of a recipe the datapack adds:

![Weathered copper door crafting recipe in the datapack.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/305db9915fce8965c2636820048ba9b7807ede54_0.webp)

Leave comments about this project on it's [Planet Minecraft Page.](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/llarkkll/)
